blurb: Large landing modules — the split-video hero with the XROSSWORLD wordmark, the elite-agency grid wall, and the brand logo lockup.

components.name: Split video hero
components.blurb: Two-panel landing hero: For Buyers / For Creators panels each with a duotoned looping video, a gradient art fallback layer, a shade, and a white pill label, plus the centered split-color XROSSWORLD wordmark.
components.html:
Agency trading desks · brand budgets For Buyers →
Every size of voice · represented For Creators →
XROSSWORLD

components.name: Agency grid
components.blurb: Elite-agency wall: a 6-column grid mixing a navy STA/BLE logo cell, duotoned face photos, and neon-yellow cells, with the 'A next-gen talent agency' headline overlaid.
components.html:
STA
BLE
A next-gen
talent agency

components.name: Wordmark
components.blurb: The XROSSWORLD logo lockup — the neon-yellow X mark SVG with a navy center node, followed by the XROSSWORLD wordmark.
components.html:
<button class="logo" onclick="go('home')" aria-label="XROSSWORLD home">
  <svg width="22" height="22" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" aria-hidden="true">
    <path d="M3 3L21 21M21 3L3 21" stroke="#E6FF00" stroke-width="2.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2.4" fill="#020617" stroke="#E6FF00" stroke-width="1.4"/>
  </svg>
  XROSSWORLD
</button>
